name: Sports EdTech
subject: Coach Education LMS: Learning Management System for Sri Lanka Cricket
content: A centralised Learning Management System built for Sri Lanka Cricket's Coach Education Unit — managing applications, learning content, assessments and certification in one platform.

content: A streamlined web-based ticketing platform with QR-based validation and an integrated raffle draw module, built to simplify event registration, check-in and prize selection.

subject: Digital Ticketing & Access Control System for D. S. Senanayake College
content: A centralised platform combining QR-based ticketing, wristband authentication and real-time access control to manage venue security and crowd movement for a major schools cricket encounter.

name: Sports Technology
subject: Royal–Thomian Digital Ticketing Management System
content: A pioneering digital ticketing and access control platform built for the 147th Royal–Thomian Cricket Encounter, delivering secure QR and wristband-based entry for one of Sri Lanka's most iconic sporting events.

name: Procurement
subject: Vendor Management: Structured Procurement for High-Stakes Operations
content: A centralised digital platform designed to streamline vendor registration, pre-qualification and supplier management — built for organisations that demand transparency and control.

name: Event Technology
subject: Accredify: Accreditation Management Made Simple
content: A smart, end-to-end accreditation system designed to manage access, credentials and approvals seamlessly across events of every scale.

name: Event Technology
subject: Accredify Vehicle Pass: Seamless Vehicle Access Management
content: A dedicated vehicle pass system that puts secure, contactless access control in the hands of your event operations team.

name: E-Learning Platform
subject: LeapX: E-Learning Built for the Modern Workplace
content: A powerful corporate e-learning platform designed to structure, deliver and track learning across your entire organisation — from onboarding to upskilling.

name: Sports Technology
subject: SLC Ticketing: End-to-End Ticketing for Live Events
content: A complete ticketing platform built to manage online and terminal sales, manifest creation and real-time ticket validation — all in one place.

name: GovTech
subject: E-Grama Niladari: Bringing Government Services to Every Citizen
content: A digital citizen portal that transforms the traditional Grama Niladari office experience into a seamless, accessible and paperless service.

name: Healthcare
subject: HIMS: Comprehensive Digital Management for Modern Healthcare
content: A fully integrated Hospital Information Management System designed to streamline every aspect of hospital operations — from patient registration to pharmacy management.

subject: LiveMatch: Real-Time Match Capturing for the Modern Game
content: A cutting-edge live match capturing platform built to record, track and analyse cricket performance with precision — ball by ball, moment by moment.

subject: eZbiz: Enterprise Resource Planning for Growing Businesses
content: A comprehensive cloud-based ERP solution designed to streamline operations, manage inventory, and drive growth for small and medium enterprises.
